name: Promo Strip
description: A compact, static announcement with a predefined icon and an optional safe link. Ideal for shipping, campaign or service messages.

attribute_definition_groups.name: Promo Strip
attribute_definition_groups.description: A compact, static announcement with a predefined icon and an optional safe link. Ideal for shipping, campaign or service messages.

attribute_definitions.name: Message
attribute_definitions.description: Short announcement shown across the strip.

attribute_definitions.name: Link label
attribute_definitions.description: Optional descriptive link label. It is shown only when a safe destination is also configured.

attribute_definitions.name: Link destination
attribute_definitions.description: Optional internal or external destination. Unsafe script and data protocols are rejected.

attribute_definitions.name: Icon
attribute_definitions.description: Safe predefined icon. Select None to show text only.

attribute_definitions.name: Tone
attribute_definitions.description: Semantic storefront color pairing used for the strip background and content.
